ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code for the country */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the country belongs to */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the country */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product of the country */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code of the country */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Name of the capital city */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language(s) of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "population" TEXT /* Total population of the region */,
  "gdp_total" REAL /* Total GDP of the region */,
  "area_sq_km" TEXT /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone(s) of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "export_thou" REAL /* Total exports in thousands of units */,
  "export_share" REAL /* Export share as a percentage of global exports */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Growth rate of the economy */,
  "colour" TEXT /* Colour code for visualization */,
  "import_thou" REAL /* Total imports in thousands of units */,
  "gdp_growth_rate" REAL /* GDP growth rate */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic indicator being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES economic_indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to access the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data source was last updated */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the data source */,
  "data_license" TEXT /* License under which the data is provided */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_source_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic indicator */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_mapping_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES economic_indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_mapping_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic indicator the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for data integrity verification */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES economic_indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic indicator the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES economic_indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic indicator */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "version_type" TEXT /* Type of version (e.g., major, minor) */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Detailed changelog for the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES economic_indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality assessment */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic indicator */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score (0-100) of the data */,
  "quality_assessment_date" TEXT /* Date the quality was assessed */,
  "quality_comments" TEXT /* Comments on the quality of the data */,
  "quality_assessor" TEXT /* Name of the person who assessed the quality */,
  "quality_method" TEXT /* Method used for quality assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES economic_indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validations" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic indicator */,
  "validation_name" TEXT /* Name of the validation process */,
  "validation_description" TEXT /* Description of the validation process */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date the validation was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validations_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES economic_indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_transformations" (
  "transformation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transformation */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic indicator */,
  "transformation_name" TEXT /* Name of the transformation process */,
  "transformation_description" TEXT /* Description of the transformation process */,
  "transformation_date" TEXT /* Date the transformation was performed */,
  "transformation_script" TEXT /* Script or command used for the transformation */,
  "transformation_tool" TEXT /* Tool or software used for the transformation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transformation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_transformations_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES economic_indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic indicator */,
  "analysis_name" TEXT /* Name of the analysis */,
  "analysis_description" TEXT /* Description of the analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_results" TEXT /* Results of the analysis */,
  "analysis_tool" TEXT /* Tool or software used for the analysis */,
  "analysis_method" TEXT /* Method used for the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analyses_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES economic_indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic indicator */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_reports_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES economic_indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "viz_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic indicator */,
  "viz_name" TEXT /* Name of the visualization */,
  "viz_type" TEXT /* Type of the visualization (e.g., chart, graph) */,
  "viz_description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization */,
  "viz_date" TEXT /* Date the visualization was created */,
  "viz_file" TEXT /* File path to the visualization */,
  "viz_tool" TEXT /* Tool or software used for the visualization */,
  "viz_dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the visualization (e.g., width, height) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("viz_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES economic_indicators ("indicator_id")
)
